implementing_authority: Department of Secondary Education, Government of Rajasthan
description: Provides an opportunity to meritorious girl students of Rajasthan government schools to pursue graduate-level education abroad for four years.

benefits.other: Economy class airfare for parent once a year and university accommodation

eligibility.academic_merit: Top 3 girls at state level in Class 10 (RBSE) from government schools

steps: Fill and submit to District Education Officer
Selection finalized by Secondary Education Department
